page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package is designed to provide a set of utilities, color schemes and conventions for genomic data. It serves as the base for various high-level packages for biological data visualization, saving development effort and encouraging consistency.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package is designed to provide a set of utilities, color schemes and conventions for genomic data. It serves as the base for various high-level packages for biological data visualization, saving development effort and encouraging consistency.
